# Data Center — Daily Progress Report
**Date:** June 15, 2026

## Summary

June 15 was an infrastructure day: the weekly GitHub Actions case-batch job ran successfully and seeded 272 simulation cases for Week 25, while three scheduled Claude Code auto-sessions (night, morning, and maintenance) all failed with `api_error` and produced no code changes. The knowledge base remains at 148 entries across 6 active modules following yesterday's 1COM + MirtaPBX expansion; no data files were modified today.
